title: Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu
tagline: Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vedapureeswarar Temple or Eswaran Dharmaraja Koil is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruverkadu, a Municipality in Tiruvallur district in the South Indian
overview.description: Vedapureeswarar Temple or Eswaran Dharmaraja Koil is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruverkadu, a Municipality in Tiruvallur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Vedapureeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Balambigai. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Tiruverkadu Devi Karumariamman Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruverkadu Devi Karumariamman Temple is a Hindu temple in Tiruverkadu, a suburb of Chennai, in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is maintained and administered by the Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department of the Government of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tiruverkadu
topPlaces.description: Thiruverkadu (Tamil: [திருவேற்காடு]; literally 'a forest of holy herbs and roots') is a western suburb of Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It comes under Thiruvallur district administration.

topPlaces.name: Kumananchavadi
topPlaces.description: Kumananchavadi is a suburb of the city of Chennai in Tamil Nadu, India. It is an upcoming residential suburb located between Iyyapanthangal and Poonamallee on the Mount-Poonamallee Road.

topPlaces.name: Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Poonamallee
topPlaces.description: The Varadaraja Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Poonamallee, a suburb of Chennai, India. Constructed in remote antiquity, the temple is dedicated to Vishnu and his consort, Pushpavalli Thayar.

topPlaces.name: Poonamallee Bus Stand metro station
topPlaces.description: Poonamallee Bus Stand Metro is an upcoming elevated metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Yellow Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This metro station will be among the 18 elevated stations of Corridor IV of the Chennai Metro, from Poonamallee Bypass to Lighthouse stretch.

topPlaces.name: Poonamallee
topPlaces.description: Poonamallee is a western suburb of Chennai, India under the Chennai Metropolitan Area. It was historically called Pushpagirimangalam, later renamed in Tamil as Poovirundhavalli (Tamil: [puːʋiɾɯn̪daʋalli]), and now colloquially called as Poondhamalli.

topPlaces.name: Mangadu
topPlaces.description: Mangadu is a town to the west of Chennai, India. Literally meaning a mango forest.

topPlaces.name: Kattupakkam
topPlaces.description: Kattupakkam is a suburb of Chennai, in Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the western side of the city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu?
faq.a: Stays in Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vedapureeswarar Temple, Thiruverkadu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiruverkadu Devi Karumariamman Temple, Tiruverkadu, Kumananchavadi, Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Poonamallee, Poonamallee Bus Stand metro station.
